text:
threshold. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 1= Medicare Defined Amount ($0) 
2= Alternate cost sharing 
Null/missing for all plans in the CCW Tier file that do not offer coverage for excluded drugs in the 
catastrophic phase of their benefit. 

COMMENT: This variable is new in 2024. The Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 eliminated cost-sharing for 
beneficiaries in the catastrophic phase of the benefit for all Part D covered drugs beginning in 2024.
